title: Per-Class Threshold Optimization
summary: Adjust per-class decision boundaries on out-of-fold (OOF) predictions to maximize the target metric. Essential when the metric is macro F1, which weights all classes equally regardless of frequency.
when_to_use: Always when the metric is macro F1 (or any class-weighted metric)
Especially impactful with class imbalance (e.g., null class at 40%+)
Optimize on OOF predictions, apply to test — never optimize on test
